creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-11-28 07:12:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Sys-Virt    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add p5-Sys-Virt 0.9.7
  
  The Sys::Virt module provides a Perl XS binding to the libvirt virtual machine
  management APIs. This allows machines running within arbitrary virtualization
  containers to be managed with a consistent API.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Sys-Virt/
  
  PR:             ports/162722
  Submitted by:   Frank Wall <fw@moov.de>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4724    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/pkg-plist (new)
